stop_assessment.reason: The observability/operator layer now has current boot guidance, minimal mobile tracker, trace waterfall, evidence search/pinning/promotion, replayable audit commands, a small operator-only bootstrap packet, and final authority export proof. Further stages are incremental release hardening, not required closure for this arc.
stop_assessment.recommended_stop: Stop after Stage 18 unless you want release/distribution hardening.
remaining_optional_next: cross-chat bootstrap rehearsal from uploaded small packet in a new chat
